violations.description: General food protection. — --Food item was not protected from potential contamination. - Sugar packets, and drink mixes found on floor at bar.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. - Wet cloth found at coffee bar.--In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. -Scoop found with handle in Chia.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. - Foods in refrigerator found not dated in secondary containers.
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. - to-go items found on floor in back storage area.
Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room used by women did not contain at least one covered waste receptacle.
